{"query":"Suno AI Chat Beta interactive dialogue refine songs credits release date features","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1794,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://suno.com/release-notes","title":"Suno Release Notes · Suno","content":"Edit in a multitrack timeline → Arrange, layer, and refine with precision.
Control BPM, volume, pitch, and more.
Introducing Hooks — a new way to bring your Suno songs to life through short-form music videos.
You get 200 free songs to make with Personas - after that, each new song made with Personas will cost 10 credits.
Pro and Premier users can now Crop Songs on Suno.
Currently Crop Songs and the new Edit Details workflows are desktop-only.
Meet your new, more personalized homepage!
Try It Now: Experience Song Radio with this specially curated selection: Try listening to this song radio here.
Pro and Premier Members now have the ability to upload profile, cover, and playlist images, as well as re-generate images via prompts.
Categories include New, Trending and Liked, a custom playlist including all of the songs you’ve liked on Suno.
We need your help testing our new model before we release it to the full community, so we're sharing access to an early version of V3, V3 Alpha, with you and other Pro and Premier members.
We think V3 Alpha creates more realistic, authentic music, but we want to know what you think!
V3 Alpha struggles to follow certain prompts like key signatures and BPM, and its songs don't always sound perfectly mixed and mastered.
You may need to prompt V3 Alpha differently than V2 for best results, and V3 Alpha will change without notice as we continue development and work toward a full release by making improvements in these areas."},{"url":"https://www.tunesona.com/blog/suno-chat/","title":"Suno Chat Guide: Features, Workflow & the Future of AI Music","content":"A complete guide to Suno Chat features, workflow, and how conversational AI is changing music creation.
If you've been using Suno recently, you may have noticed that it quietly launched and then removed a testing feature called Suno Chat.
This is a beta feature and not every Suno user has it.
Step 2 After entering the Chat interface, you will see a conversation interface.
If it's on, Suno will automatically generate music in every conversation.
Through simple dialogue, it helps you create your own music step-by-step.
If you still prefer more granular control using prompts, Tunesona also offers a custom mode.
AI performs strategic plan before generating lyrics and songs.
Step 1 Visit Tunesona and get free creation credits.
Tunesona will provide a strategy arrangement including emotion, vocals, BPM, and instrumentation.
Tunesona will generate detailed style prompts and lyrics based on the previously confirmed strategy.
Suno Chat is currently in beta and has been temporarily closed."}]}
